name: for_htmlembed
description: Protected HTML/JS embed plugin for TinyMCE (FriendsOfREDAXO) — non-editable code block with edit dialog

scripts.build-copy: mkdir -p ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_htmlembed/ ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/for_htmlembed/ && mkdir -p ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_htmlembed/ ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/for_htmlembed/

author: FriendsOfREDAXO
